brand.name: TREVISOFT
brand.tagline: A home for the side projects I build when curiosity wins.
brand.subtagline: Apps, experiments, game tools, creative generators, extensions, and whatever ships next.
brand.footerText: Side projects, experiments, and useful weirdness by Marco Trevisani.

supportLink.label: Star me on GitHub
supportLink.disabledReason: GitHub repository link will be added before launch.

projects.name: VinylPNG
projects.summary: Create cinematic vinyl visuals, cover mockups, and animated record videos from your artwork.
projects.description: Export scroll-stopping PNGs and reel-ready video assets for TikTok, Instagram, music launches, and promo drops.

projects.name: PixBatch
projects.summary: Convert HEIC, TIFF, PNG, JPG, AVIF, and WEBP images in bulk.
projects.description: A private browser-based image converter with local processing, quality controls, and resize settings.

projects.name: VidBatch
projects.summary: Convert and process videos in bulk from the browser.
projects.description: A focused batch video tool for quick format workflows and repeatable media preparation.

projects.name: AudioBatch
projects.summary: Convert WAV, MP3, M4A, FLAC, OGG, and WEBM audio files in bulk.
projects.description: A free private browser-based converter with local processing, bitrate, sample-rate, and channel settings.

projects.name: DropHunter
projects.summary: Track and farm Twitch Drops with less manual tab juggling.
projects.description: Queue campaigns, monitor reward progress, open eligible streams, and auto-claim rewards when Twitch marks them ready.

projects.name: SteamWatch
projects.summary: Track favorite Steam games with live player counts, Twitch viewers, and alerts.
projects.description: Keep local trend history for the games you watch and spot activity spikes without checking every store page by hand.

projects.name: ARC Raiders Build Planner
projects.summary: Plan ARC Raiders skill trees for Conditioning, Mobility, and Survival.
projects.description: Test point allocations, compare builds, and share a focused Raider setup before heading topside.
